scope: Exact row only; backend runtime safety hardening; no support claim change
change: Non-streaming completion/chat generation now runs on a blocking worker with a configurable wall-clock timeout via CAMELID_GENERATION_TIMEOUT_MS. Timeout returns a controlled 503 generation_timeout response instead of leaving the client waiting indefinitely.
notes: This does not resolve the long-generation parity divergence at generated token index 9.
This does not broaden Mixtral support beyond the already-promoted exact-row short-prompt/API/WebUI/RSS envelope.

The guard bounds non-streaming API hangs; a timed-out blocking worker may still finish in the background, so operators should use the timeout as a safety valve and continue investigating long-generation performance/parity separately.
